name: Banana Granola Bread (Machine) - Large Loaf
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Yeast (Fast Rise or Machine) - or -
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the machine to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine water, bread flour, wheat flour, dry milk, salt, and butter. Mix until well combined.
3. Add mashed bananas, granola, molasses, chopped walnuts, dried banana chips, and yeast. Stir until just mixed.
4. Place the mixture in the machine's loaf pan and bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Turn off the machine and let it cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it from the pan.
